Interface IRasterTypeFactory2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster

ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster type factory.

[Guid("DB9BE81C-0BB0-4661-A2B4-66B7627421BA")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterTypeFactory2 : IRasterTypeFactory
